svg.title: ABSA Pipeline Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Four-stage architecture: Data Preprocessing, Model Fine-Tuning, Inference Pipeline, and Web Demo, connected by data flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FABSA dataset')
sendPrompt('What cleaning steps are applied to the FABSA data?')
sendPrompt('What is pairwise expansion for ABSA?')
sendPrompt('What are the train/val/test split sizes?')
sendPrompt('Explain the LoRA fine-tuning configuration used here')
sendPrompt('How was the model evaluation done?')
sendPrompt('Where is the LoRA adapter stored?')
sendPrompt('What format does the input review take?')
sendPrompt('How does Gemini Flash perform aspect category detection?')
sendPrompt('How does the DeBERTa ACSC stage classify sentiment?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the structured output contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the Browse tab in the web demo show?')
g.text: Pre-analyzed Trustpilot · Banking · IT · E-Commerce · Fashion

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Live Analysis tab work?')
